description: Modern Vite / SPA project with a browser-based UI.

tool_chain.purpose: Start Vite dev server if not already running
Verify DOM content, element presence, and ARIA state
Set viewport to iPhone SE (375x667) and capture visual layout
Set viewport to Pixel 7 / Android phone (393x851) and capture visual layout
Set viewport to iPad (768x1024) and capture visual layout
Set viewport to Galaxy Tab S9 / Android tablet (800x1280) and capture visual layout
Set viewport to Desktop (1280x800) and capture visual layout
